representative: one vectorized cyclic permutation inside every repeated-species block

decision_rule.fail: same visible noisy state and same unlabeled endpoint produce different translation-only DSM targets; repair the target on the joint translation-permutation quotient before more training
decision_rule.pass: row-label nuisance is not a measured cause; inspect coordinate representation without changing the target
decision_rule.boundary: Read-only H1a attribution. It cannot change the failed pretraining result, add steps or seeds, initialize joint training, or authorize H1b-H6.
